positive: Intricate celestial botanicals forming a symmetrical mandala pattern. The design features stylized crescent moons, nebulae dust painted with gold foil effect, bioluminescent deep purple and sapphire blue flowers, and elegant, winding vines structured with geometric Art Nouveau precision. The overall composition is highly centralized, suitable for a seamless repeat pattern, characterized by strong silhouettes and high contrast. Minimalist yet ornate, using clean linework, hyper-detailed vector illustration style, symmetrical radial composition. Studio lighting, isolated on a solid off-white background, high resolution, graphic design poster art.
